title: Exploration+
description: Exploration+ is a vanilla+, relatively performance-friendly modpack designed to enhance and encourage exploration and building, with generous QoL features to create a fun, casual experience.
body:
WARNING: Exploration+ requires atleast 3-4 gigs of ram to start

**Exploration+** is a vanilla+, relatively performance-friendly modpack designed to enhance and encourage exploration and building, with generous QoL features to create a fun, casual experience. With mods like Create, Immersive Aircraft, Macaw's Furniture, and Paladin's Furniture, plus hundreds of new biome blocks, your builds will come to life, while mods like Lootr, Additional Structures, Artifacts, Dungeons and Taverns, Repurposed Structures, River Redux, YUNG's Dungeon mods, and When Dungeons Arise make exploring simultaneously refreshingly unique and exciting.
